info.title: Massage Booking API
info.description: API documentation for massage booking application

parameters.description: Comma-separated fields to sort by (prefix with - for descending)

post.summary: Create a new massage shop (Admin only)

200.description: Massage shop deleted (associated reservations are also removed)

get.summary: Get all reservations (own reservations for users, all for admins)

post.summary: Create a new reservation (max 3 per user)

400.description: Invalid reserveDate, massage shop not found, or user already has 3 reservations

put.summary: Update a reservation (owner or admin only)

401.description: Unauthorized - Not the reservation owner or admin

delete.summary: Delete a reservation (owner or admin only)

401.description: Unauthorized - Not the reservation owner or admin

patch.summary: Create a review for a reservation (owner only, integer 1–5, one-time)

400.description: Invalid rating value or reservation already reviewed

post.summary: Create a review for a reservation

400.description: Invalid rating value, missing reservation ID, or reservation already reviewed

get.summary: Get all reviews created by the logged-in user
Get my review(s) by reservation ID for past reservations

400.description: Invalid reservation ID or reservation is not in the past yet

500.description: Cannot get user reviews by reservation ID

get.summary: Get all reservations for a specific massage shop (Admin: all; User: own)

200.description: List of reservations for the massage shop

post.summary: Create a reservation for a specific massage shop (max 3 per user)

parameters.name: massageId
parameters.description: Massage shop ID (takes precedence over body massage field)
